translation.en: We need to say goodbye to each other.

notes_md:
**chia tay** = to break up with someone. It’s also used for saying goodbye or parting ways in general, not just romantic relationships.

It’s a verb. You can use it for couples, friends, coworkers, or even leaving a job.  

For married couples, **ly hôn** is stronger and legal (divorce). Opposite idea in dating is **quay lại** (get back together).
exampleSentencesTranslated: After many arguments, he and his girlfriend decided to break up.
I feel sad when I have to break up with old friends.
We should talk clearly before we break up.
notes:
chia tay = to break up with someone. It’s also used for saying goodbye or parting ways in general, not just romantic relationships.

It’s a verb. You can use it for couples, friends, coworkers, or even leaving a job.  

For married couples, ly hôn is stronger and legal (divorce). Opposite idea in dating is quay lại (get back together).

translation.en: We will say goodbye at the weekend.

content.sentence: Chúng tôi sẽ ___ vào cuối tuần.

exampleSentences: Sau nhiều lần cãi nhau, anh và bạn gái đã quyết định chia tay.
Em cảm thấy buồn khi phải chia tay với những người bạn cũ.
Chúng ta nên nói chuyện rõ ràng trước khi chia tay.

example.en: We broke up after a long time together.
example.vi: Chúng tôi đã chia tay sau một thời gian dài bên nhau.
example.es: Terminamos después de mucho tiempo juntos.

definitions.vi: Kết thúc một mối quan hệ tình cảm.
